title: Login and open the employee directory
description: A valid signed-in user can authenticate and reach the full employee list page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the employee list page is displayed
Verify the employee directory is visible

title: Log out and return to the login page
description: This verifies that logging out from the app bar signs the user out and returns them to the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Log out from the app bar
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify protected employee pages are no longer accessible

title: View the full employee table after login
description: A signed-in user can load the directory and see the employee table populated with employee records.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the employee table is displayed
Verify employee records are visible

title: Update an employee from a pre-filled edit form
description: This verifies that a manager can open an existing employee for editing, change details, submit the update, and see the list refresh with the updated record.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an employee for editing from the list
Verify the edit form is pre-filled with the employee's current data
Change the employee name field
Change the employee email field
Change the employee position field
Submit the update form
Verify a success confirmation is visible and the updated employee appears in the list

title: Delete an employee after confirming the prompt
description: This verifies that confirming deletion removes an employee from the directory and shows a success notification.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start deleting an employee from the list
Verify a confirmation dialog is visible for the selected employee
Confirm the deletion
Verify a success confirmation is visible and the employee is removed from the list

title: Delete an employee from the list and refresh the directory
description: A signed-in user can remove an employee from the table and see that record no longer listed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the delete flow for an employee in the table
Confirm the deletion
Verify the employee record is no longer visible in the table
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Add a new employee from the list page modal
description: This verifies that a user can create a new employee from the list modal and see the new record appear in the directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the add employee dialog from the list page
Fill in the name field with a valid employee name
Fill in the email field with a valid employee email
Fill in the position field with a valid employee position
Submit the employee form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the new employee appears in the list

title: Edit an employee from the list and keep the directory updated
description: A signed-in user can update an existing employee from the table and see the revised record in the directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the edit flow for an employee in the table
Change one or more employee fields to valid updated values
Submit the employee form
Verify the updated employee record is visible in the table
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Add a new employee from the standalone form page
description: This verifies that a user can create a new employee from the dedicated form page and return to the list with the new record visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the standalone employee form
Fill in the name field with a valid employee name
Fill in the email field with a valid employee email
Fill in the position field with a valid employee position
Submit the employee form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the new employee appears in the list

title: Edit an existing employee from the list
description: This verifies that a user can update an employee from the list and see the refreshed row data afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the edit form for an employee from the list
Change the employee name to a valid updated value
Change the employee email to a valid updated value
Change the employee position to a valid updated value
Submit the employee form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the employee list reflects the updated employee

title: Delete an employee from the list
description: This verifies that a user can delete an employee from the list and the record is removed after confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the delete confirmation for an employee from the list
Confirm the delete action
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the employee is removed from the list

title: Edit only one field and keep the rest of the employee data intact
description: This verifies that submitting an edit with a single changed field preserves the other pre-filled employee values and refreshes the directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an employee for editing from the list
Verify the edit form is pre-filled with the employee's current data
Change the employee position field
Submit the update form
Verify a success confirmation is visible and the employee remains listed with the updated details

title: Search filters employees by name, email, and position
description: This verifies that typing a search term filters the employee directory to matching rows across the searchable fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Type a search term that matches an employee name, email, or position into the search field
Verify the employee table is filtered to matching employees

title: Search the employee directory by employee details
description: A signed-in user can search across employee fields and see the table filtered to matching employees.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Enter a search term that matches an employee name, email, or position
Verify the employee table is filtered to matching results
Verify matching employee records are visible

title: Open and close an employee details dialog
description: This verifies that a user can open an employee’s details from the list and dismiss the dialog afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an employee's details from the list
Verify the employee details dialog is displayed
Close the details dialog
Verify the employee details dialog is no longer visible

title: Open an employee details dialog from the list
description: A signed-in user can open an employee’s details from the table and view the employee information dialog.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the details view for an employee in the table
Verify an employee details dialog is displayed
Verify the selected employee’s information is visible

title: Cancel an employee deletion
description: This verifies that dismissing the delete confirmation keeps the employee in the list and returns the user to browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start deleting an employee from the list
Cancel the deletion
Verify the employee list remains visible and the employee is still present

title: Toggle between light and dark themes on the list page
description: A signed-in user can switch themes from the employee list while staying on the same page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Toggle the theme from the app bar
Toggle the theme again from the app bar
Verify the employee list page remains displayed
Verify the theme changes are reflected on the page

title: Stay on the employee list while toggling the theme
description: This verifies that the user can switch between light and dark themes without leaving the employee list page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Toggle the theme setting
Toggle the theme setting again
Verify the employee list remains visible

title: Cancel an employee edit without saving changes
description: This verifies that closing the edit form without submitting leaves the employee record unchanged in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an employee for editing from the list
Close the edit form without submitting
Verify the employee list is still displayed and no update confirmation is visible

title: Switch between light and dark themes on the employee list
description: This verifies that the user can toggle the app appearance while staying on the employee directory page.

steps.description: Navigate to /list
Toggle the theme mode
Verify the interface switches to the other theme while the employee list remains visible

title: Search shows an empty state when there are no matches
description: This verifies that entering a search term with no matches shows the empty results message instead of any employee rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Type a search term that matches no employees into the search field
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: A user who enters invalid credentials sees an error and does not enter the employee area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error message is visible
Verify the employee list page is not displayed
